subject: Joint Distributions
question: An insurance policy is written to cover a loss $X$ where $X$ has density function $f_X(x) = \begin{cases} \frac{3}{8}x^2 & 0 \le x \le 2 \\ 0 & \text{otherwise.} \end{cases}$ The time $T$ (in hours) to process a claim of size $x$, where $0 \le x \le 2$, is uniformly distributed on the interval from $x$ to $2x$. Calculate the probability that a randomly chosen claim on this policy is processed in three hours or more.
